summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Geist: The Sin-Eaters AI Storyteller. Backend APIs (13/13) and frontend UI functionality working excellently. AI integration with GPT-5.2 responding correctly. Minor overlay issue with dice roller resolved with force clicks.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally intercepts dice roller button clicks

integration_issues.issue: Session deletion confirmation works but UI may not immediately reflect removal

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor overlay issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding z-index fix for dice roller button to prevent badge overlay interference. Otherwise, app is production-ready with all core features working.
